description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
At 2:06pm a WeRide driverless vehicle (car 1) was stopped behind a big rig truck (vehicle 2). As our vehicle (car 1) was stopped behind the 
big rig truck, the big rig truck proceeded to reverse backwards and eventually collided into the WeRide vehicle (car 1). Both parties pulled 
over both involved vehicles and cooperated to exchange information. The damage sustained to the WeRide vehicle was moderate and the big
 rig truck did not have any damage. 
Print
Clear Form
